title: Fermented Crunchy Portuguese Peach Pilaf
description: This low-carb-friendly meal-prep dish features fermented peaches blended with a crunchy texture to create a delightful and nutritious breakfast or snack.
instructions: Whisk almond flour and coconut oil until creamy.
Add baking powder and salt to the whisked mixture.
Mix in fermented peach puree until everything is well combined. The consistency should be slightly thicker than a regular batter but still pourable.
Sprinkle flax seeds on top of the batter before cooking for added texture.
Heat up a non-stick skillet over medium heat and pour in the mixture, spreading it out evenly to form a thin layer.
Bake at 350°F (180°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving with almond milk if desired.
